checks.name: codex_websocket_warning
checks.detail: Fresh `pnpm happytg verify --json` still reports `CODEX_SMOKE_WARNINGS` at warning severity with message `Codex Responses websocket returned 403 Forbidden, then the CLI fell back to HTTP.`, and `packages/runtime-adapters/src/index.ts` still maps that path to warn-only fallback wording. The bundle correctly proves a legitimate environment warning; no current product fix is needed.

checks.name: install_summary_pairing_handoff
checks.detail: The builder artifacts `raw/install-json.txt`, `raw/daemon-pair.txt`, and `raw/hosts.json`, together with current `packages/bootstrap/src/install/pairing.ts`, `packages/bootstrap/src/install/index.ts`, `apps/bot/src/handlers.ts`, and fresh `pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap test -- --runInBand --testNamePattern "runHappyTGInstall|evaluateInstallPairingDecision|Codex"`, still prove that install summary renders a concrete `/pair CODE` only after a real code is requested or refreshed and otherwise falls back honestly to manual `pnpm daemon:pair` guidance. No current product fix is needed for the reported install-summary symptom.

checks.name: api_reuse_path
checks.detail: Fresh `pnpm happytg verify --json` still classifies API port `4000` as `occupied_expected` by HappyTG API, and fresh `pnpm --filter @happytg/api test -- --runInBand --testNamePattern "startApiServer"` still passes reuse, foreign-conflict, different-service, and transient-handoff coverage. The existing raw `dev-api*.txt` artifacts remain consistent with current code, so no current product fix is needed.

checks.name: turbo_notice_relatedness
checks.detail: Existing `raw/build.txt`, `raw/lint.txt`, `raw/typecheck.txt`, and `raw/test-unit.txt` still show only the normal `turbo 2.9.3` banner and no reproduced update notice, so the bundle supports `unrelated` / `not reproduced` rather than a product root cause.

checks.name: proof_bundle_validation
checks.detail: After final bundle synchronization, `pnpm happytg task validate --repo . --task HTG-2026-04-19-install-summary-pairing-dev-warning-triage` and `pnpm happytg task status --repo . --task HTG-2026-04-19-install-summary-pairing-dev-warning-triage` both report `Validation: ok`, `Phase: complete`, and `Verification: passed`.
